# AORMS

AORMS stands for Accelerated Operational Resources Management System — a platform for AEC consulting firms (architecture and engineering practices that advise clients).

AORMS is NOT solution delivery software and NOT construction project management. It provides an operational framework (how the office runs) and a design framework (how engagements are structured) on one spine, with two AI agents: **EmOI** (external) and **ESTI** (internal).

Two apps on one platform:
- **AORMS-Studio** — architecture consultancy app for Indian architecture and design consultancies (shipping)
- **AORMS-Consultancy** — engineering consultancy app for structural, MEP, civil, and multidisciplinary firms (roadmap)

Platform home: https://aorms.in/
Architecture app (sign in): https://aorms.in/login
Central wiki: https://aorms.in/wiki

AORMS-Studio capabilities:
- Fee recovery — what needs invoicing, next payment stage, incoming receipts, due dates, GST reminders
- Client revision management — MoM → ESTI extracts → client request → architect marks criticality → client approves → then site
- Meeting minutes on the project record with ESTI-drafted revision requests
- Drawing register, transmittals and client approval workflows
- COA fee proposals and GST invoicing with reconciliation
- Studio Intelligence dashboard and Ask ESTI (BYO API key supported)
- **EmOI** — external AI agent (validates outside sources); **ESTI** — internal AI agent (answers from firm repositories)
- Official user documentation at aorms.in/wiki
- Cloud browser workspace at studio.aorms.in — one standard licence, unlimited users, 5 GB included storage

Website:
https://aorms.in
